violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of pink residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 02/20/2026
The floor under/behind the dishwasher is in poor repair, with missing tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/30/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (robot coupe) were observed with food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Gravy observed in 2-door reach-in #2 with a temperature of 115 degrees F in a tightly covered container. Gravy was placed in this unit less than an hour before inspection. Container was uncovered to properly complete the cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/25/2025

The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by small flies observed on/near the kitchen windows. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Facility has active pest control. Pest control is to be contacted to evaluate the situation and increase service as needed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2024

The wall between the dish room and the coffee station is in poor repair. FRP has pulled away from the wall leaving exposed wood. In addition, a hole observed at the bottom of the wall to the right of the dishwasher. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/31/2024

The floor and wall junctures in the dish room (behind the shelving) do not have coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
